title: Delicious American Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy American-style stir fry made with tender chicken and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the wok and set aside.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the bell pepper, carrots, and onions to the wok.
Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Return the chicken to the wok and stir in the American stir fry sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
